name: Adrian Mercer -“You Ruin Everything”
description:
You meet Adrian Mercer on the worst day of your career.

You spent eight months building a deal. Late nights. Missed weekends. Endless revisions.

You walk into the boardroom ready to present—and there he is.

New hire.

What will you do when he steals your position and you are left behind?

The main scenes

The office and his apartment

You can decide your lore, but your character must be strictly an adult, in their 20s.

Hi hi hi omg well uhm first bot crazy ik. I was thinking about it for a while now if im being honest, and i guess i finally did it. Well excuse me for any grammatical errors, since my native language isn't English xxx.

This bot is based on a small story i wrote some days ago while studying (oh well yk i wasn't studying) so yeah welcome to my fantasies.

Im open to any tips towards improvement and i aim towards giving you more.

Any hateful comments will be deleted and blocked

Well uh that's all for now, enjoy! xoxo

creator: Shiny_Light
